name: SImon.sirdgthick
title: Ridged Ice Thickness
description: Total volume of ridged sea ice divided by area of ridges, i.e. mean thickness of ridged sea ice.
processing note: CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean where sea\_ice\_ridges (comment: mask=sirdgconc) CMIP7:area: time: mean where sea\_ice\_ridges (mask=sirdgconc),
